zh.lifeSummary: 當Comtesse Marie d'Évreux於大約1303年出生在法國豪-諾門迪艾艾福時，她的父親Louis d'Evreux28歲，母親Marguerite d'Artois19歲。她與Hertog Jan III van Brabant在比利時布拉班特結婚。他們至少是3個女兒的父母。她去世於1335年10月31日在比利時維斯吉福拉安德倫布盧潔辛吉可盧易斯享年33歲，埋葬在比利時布拉班特布波瑟爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Comtesse Marie d'Évreux于大约1303年出生在法国豪-諾門迪艾艾福时，她的父亲Louis d'Evreux28岁，母亲Marguerite d'Artois19岁。她与Hertog Jan III van Brabant在比利时布拉班特结婚。他们至少是3个女儿的父母。她去世于1335年10月31日在比利时維斯吉福拉安德倫布盧潔辛吉可盧易斯享年33岁，埋葬在比利时布拉班特布波瑟爾。

nameMeanings.name: d'Évreux
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Dermot, Sean.
English and Irish: of Norman origin, a habitational name for someone from Évreux in Eure, France, with the preposition d(e). See also Everest for the name without the preposition.

History: This was the surname of the Earls of Essex from 1572 to 1641. Walter Devereux, 1st Earl of Essex, led an attempted colonization of Ulster, and his son, Robert, 2nd Earl of Essex, briefly held the position of lord lieutenant of Ireland in 1599.

variants.name: Devereaux
meanings: English and Irish: of Norman origin, a variant of   Devereux  .

variants.name: Everest
meanings: English (southeastern): of Norman origin, a variant of Devereux without the fused preposition (Old French de). Compare Evers .

variants.name: Evers
meanings: English: perhaps a variant of Devereux without the fused preposition (Old French de).

English: de-aspirated variant of Heaver, with post-medieval excrescent -s, a habitational name from Hever (Kent), named from Old English hēah ‘high’ + (Kentish) Old English ēfre ‘edge or brow of a hill’. Alternatively, the name may derive from some minor place in southeastern England named with Old English ȳfre, (Kentish) Old English ēfre, Middle English evere ‘edge or brow of a hill, tip of a promontory’, with the addition of a prosthetic H-.
North German and Dutch: genitivized patronymic from the personal name Evert , which lost its t in pronunciation and spelling subsequently; compare Everts . Compare also Avers .

variants.name: Deveraux
meanings: English and Irish: of Norman origin, a variant of   Devereux  .

variants.name: Devery
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Kieran, Brendan, Clancy.
Irish (Offaly): of Norman origin, a variant of   Devereux  .

variants.name: Devary
meanings: Probably Irish: variant of Devery, a variant of Devereux in counties Leix and Offaly.

variants.name: Debrow
meanings: Altered form of English or Irish   Devereux  .

nameMeanings.name: Marie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Maria . When first introduced to England in the Middle Ages, it was Anglicized in pronunciation and respelled Mary . This French form was reintroduced into the English-speaking world as a separate name in the 19th century, and is still pronounced more or less in the French manner, although sometimes with the stress on the first syllable. It is now often used in combination with other names such as Ellie, Chloe, and Lisa.

en.lifeSummary: When Comtesse Marie d'Évreux was born about 1303, in Évreux, Eure, Upper Normandy, France, her father, Louis d'Evreux, was 28 and her mother, Marguerite d'Artois, was 19. She married Hertog Jan III van Brabant in Brabant, Belgium. They were the parents of at least 3 daughters. She died on 31 October 1335, in Sint-Kruis, Brugge, West Flanders, Belgium, at the age of 33, and was buried in Brussels, Brabant, Belgium.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Comtesse Marie d'Évreux est née environ 1303, à Évreux, Eure, Haute-Normandie, France, son père, Louis d'Evreux, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Marguerite d'Artois, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Hertog Jan III van Brabant à Brabant, Belgique. Ils ont eu au moins 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 31 octobre 1335, à Sint-Kruis, Brugge, Flandre occidentale, Belgique, à l’âge de 33 ans, et a été enterrée à Bruxelles, Brabant, Belgique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Comtesse Marie d'Évreux um 1303 in Évreux, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Louis d'Evreux 28 und ihre Mutter Marguerite d'Artois 19. Sie hat in Brabant, Belgien Hertog Jan III van Brabant geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 31. Oktober 1335 im Alter von 33 Jahren in Sint-Kruis, Brugge, West-Flandern, Belgien und wurde in Brüssel, Brabant, Belgien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Comtesse Marie d'Évreux è nata il circa 1303 nel Évreux, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Francia, sua padre, Louis d'Evreux, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Marguerite d'Artois, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato Hertog Jan III van Brabant nel Brabante, Belgio. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figlie. Morì il 31 ottobre 1335, nel Sint-Kruis, Brugge, Fiandra Occidentale, Belgio, all'età di 33 anni, e fu sepolta a Brussel, Brabante, Belgio.

ja.lifeSummary: Comtesse Marie d'Évreuxが約1303年にフランスハウテ-ノーマンディエウアevレウックスで生まれた時，父Louis d'Evreuxは28歳，母Marguerite d'Artoisは19歳であった。ベルギーブラバントでHertog Jan III van Brabantと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1335年10月31日にベルギーウエスト-vラアンデレンブルグッジシント-クルイスで33歳で死去し，ベルギーブラバントブルセルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Comtesse Marie d'Évreux(이)가 대략 1303년 프랑스 하테-노먼디 우르 e브레우스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Louis d'Evreux(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Marguerite d'Artois(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 벨기에 브라반트에서 Hertog Jan III van Brabant(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1335년 10월 31일 벨기에 웨스트-블라아더 브루지 신트-크루이스에서 33세의 나이로 사망했으며 벨기에 브라반트 브루셀에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Comtesse Marie d'Évreux nasceu aproximadamente 1303, em Évreux, Eure, Haute-Normandie, França, seu pai, Louis d'Evreux, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Marguerite d'Artois, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com Hertog Jan III van Brabant em Brabante, Bélgica. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 31 de outubro de 1335, em Sint-Kruis, Brugge, Flandres Ocidental, Bélgica, com 33 anos, e foi sepultada em Bruxelas, Brabante, Bélgica.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Comtesse Marie d'Évreux родилась около 1303 г. в местности eвреукс, эур, хауте-норманди, Франция, её отцу по имени Louis d'Evreux было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Marguerite d'Artois, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hertog Jan III van Brabant в местности брабант, Бельгия. У них было по крайней мере 3 дочери. Она умерла 31 октября 1335 г. в местности синт-круиз, бруг, вест-влаандирен, Бельгия в возрасте 33 лет и была похоронена в местности брассел, брабант, Бельгия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Comtesse Marie d'Évreux nació aproximadamente 1303, en Évreux, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Francia, su papá, Louis d'Evreux, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Marguerite d'Artois, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Hertog Jan III van Brabant en Brabante, Bélgica. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijas. Murió el 31 de octubre de 1335, en Sint-Kruis, Brugge, Flandes Occidental, Bélgica, a la edad de 33 años, y fue sepultada en Brussel, Brabante, Bélgica.
